name: Calcolatore di Moquette
seo_title: Calcolatore Moquette – Metri Quadri e Lineari
seo_description: Calcola quanta moquette ti serve in m², yard quadrati e metri lineari. Inserisci le dimensioni della stanza e la larghezza del rotolo.
description: Calcolatore 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Linear metres from roll: ceil(20 ÷ 3.66) × 3.66 = ~21.96 m
Add 10% for cuts and seams: ~24 linear metres
mistakes: Measuring the room and buying exactly that area — seams and cuts waste 10-15%
Forgetting to add extra for pattern matching (pattern repeat × number of drops)
Not accounting for door and bay window recesses
formula_display: Room area = Length × Width; Linear metres = ceil(area ÷ roll_width × adjustment_factor)
